title: OCCUPATIONAL HEALTH AND SAFETY DIVISION - 211info
text: OREGON OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH DIVISION OCCUPATIONAL HEALTH AND SAFETY DIVISION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Reviews and investigates worker complaints regarding safety and health on the job, inspects work sites, investigates on-the-job accidents and deaths, and consults with employers regarding accident prevention requirements. Occupational Safety and Health issues are the focus. Online services include ordering videos, publications, and rules; registering for workshops; taking safety classes; and obtaining radio signal permits. 350 Winter Street NE 3rd Floor Salem, OR 97309 Eligibility: Individuals who are employees or employers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 378-3272 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-3272 Toll-free (800) 922-2689 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for information. Calls will be referred to local field offices if applicable. Website also includes contact directory for local offices. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Occupational Health and Safety Occupational Health and Safety * COVID-19 Specialized Information and Referral * Accident Victims Workplace Evaluation/Modification Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - OMBUDSMAN FOR INJURED WORKERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH DIVISION
